ValidationRule.description: Validates that Resolve Issues and Retry Issues are only enabled when Log Issues is enabled.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR ( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED(ResolveIssues__c), ISCHANGED(RetryIssues__c) ), OR ( ResolveIssues__c = TRUE, RetryIssues__c = TRUE ), LogIssues__c = FALSE )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Resolve Issues or Retry Issues can only be enabled when Log Issues is enabled.
